reasoning: Koren, this session specifically targets your primary limiter: poor lactate clearance and underdeveloped aerobic base. Your recent data suggests extended rest, so we'll start controlled. By focusing on over-unders, we aim to boost your fatigue resistance and aerobic efficiency, which are crucial for maintaining 220-235W during the Alpine Loop climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 4 x 10 min over-unders (2 min @ 209W, 3 min @ 242W, 2 min @ 218W, 3 min @ 256W), with 5 min recovery @ 50% FTP between sets

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
